_meta.description: W-Engine database (Lv. 60, R1 — refinement effects are never auto-applied). v1 ships only the DUMMY engine (a copy of Deep Sea Visitor); more engines are added here as a data-only change.
_meta.conventions: advanced_stat uses the same stat names and fraction convention as discs.json (0.24 = 24%). passive_note documents effects the user must enter manually as external buffs. Optional 'refinement' models rank-scaled passives (pilot: Sharpened Stinger only): 'rank' selects the row of 'per_stack_by_rank' (index rank-1); 'conditional_buff' is a stacking DMG% buff applied only to damage of its 'element', with active stacks asked at runtime.

dummy_engine.name: DUMMY Engine (Deep Sea Visitor copy, R1)
dummy_engine.passive_note: R1 passive (Ice DMG +25%, conditional CRIT Rate buffs) is NOT auto-applied; enter it as external buffs when active.

sharpened_stinger.name: Sharpened Stinger (R2)

conditional_buff.name: Predatory Instinct
conditional_buff.note: Dash attacks grant stacks; 3 stacks are granted instantly on entering combat or perfect dodge - effectively always max in practice.

sharpened_stinger.passive_note: Anomaly Buildup +40% (R1) to +80% (R5) at max stacks affects buildup speed only, not proc damage. The Physical DMG% stacks are modeled via the refinement system (stacks asked at runtime).

heartstring_nocturne.name: Heartstring Nocturne (R1)
heartstring_nocturne.passive_note: R1 passive (CRIT DMG +50%; Heartstring stacks ignore part of enemy Fire RES) is NOT auto-applied; enter as external CRIT DMG / RES shred when active.

timeweaver.name: Timeweaver (R1)
timeweaver.passive_note: Advanced stat ATK% 30 PROVISIONAL (one source said 12% - panel-check). R1 passive (Electric Anomaly Buildup +30%; AP +75 for 15s when EX hits an anomalous enemy; Disorder DMG +25% at AP >= 375) is NOT auto-applied.

flight_of_fancy.name: Flight of Fancy (R1)
flight_of_fancy.passive_note: R1 passive (Anomaly Buildup +40%; stacking AP up to +120 on Ether damage) is NOT auto-applied; enter active AP stacks as external AP when measuring.

joyau_dore.name: Joyau Dore (R1)
joyau_dore.passive_note: R1 passive (Windswept/Vortex enhancement; squad AP buff at stacks) is NOT auto-applied.
